events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! What's your favourite track from the Commodores frontman turned solo superstar?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: The iconic Cyndi Lauper, famed for her distinctive voice and vibrant style, celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Celebration
angles.copy: Girls (and boys) just want to have fun celebrating Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday today! What's your go-to anthem from the pop legend?

events.title: Remembering George Michael, would have been 63
events.blurb: Today marks the birthday of the late, great George Michael, who would have been 63.

angles.name: Tribute to a Legend
angles.copy: On what would have been his 63rd birthday, we're remembering the incredible talent of George Michael. His music continues to inspire and move us.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: It's 17 years since the music world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who passed away on this day in 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we said goodbye to a true icon. Michael Jackson's influence on music and culture remains unmatched. What's your favourite MJ moment?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Fab Four Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From Liverpool to global superstardom, what's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock God Birthday
angles.copy: A very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite riff or solo from the man with the Red Special?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday, continuing his incredible legacy in rock music.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? Still got the moves! What's your ultimate Rolling Stones track?

events.title: 45 Years of MTV
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! Remember the first video ever played? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, kicking off the Britpop era.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of the 90s. What's your favourite track from this iconic album?

events.title: 57 Years Since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music and counterculture, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Take a trip back to 1969! 57 years ago today, the Woodstock Music & Art Fair kicked off, becoming a defining moment for a generation.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we remember the unparalleled Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 today. His legacy as the King lives on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of rap icon Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years ago today, we lost a voice that still resonates. Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55, and his enduring impact on hip-hop.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we pay tribute to the incomparable Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His guitar wizardry changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969, featuring timeless tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Rocker
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders track to turn up loud?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for it Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune featuring that unmistakable voice?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album 'Imagine' on this day in 1971, featuring the timeless title track.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple launched the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Quarter Century
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? 25 years ago today, Apple introduced the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How many did you go through?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent and the enduring film franchise.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, what's your favourite thing about 007?
